brand.name: Sopaan
brand.trustNote: Free to start  ·  Secure sign-in  ·  No card required
brand.secureNote: Encrypted sign-in · your data stays private

motivations.0: Every mock test moves you closer to cracking your exam.
motivations.1: Consistency beats cramming — show up today.
motivations.2: Your path to success is built one step at a time.
motivations.3: AI tests + practice games = smarter prep, less burnout.
motivations.4: Exam toppers study daily — you're already here.
motivations.5: One focused hour today beats ten distracted tomorrow.

splash.tagline: AI prep to crack any exam

welcome.title: Welcome to Sopaan
welcome.highlight: AI tests, GK games, and a personal coach — all in one place.

login.brandSubtitle: Sign in to continue your prep
login.forgotPasswordBody: We'll send a one-time code to your email so you can reset your password.
login.emailOtpA11y: Sign in with a one-time code sent to your email
login.termsPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
login.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
login.checkPhonePassword: Check your phone number and password
login.adminUseWebConsole: This is an admin account. Use the web admin console — not the student app.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Start your prep journey
signup.name: Full name
signup.comingSoonMessage: Google sign-in will be available soon.
signup.consentAi: I consent to AI processing of my study data via Claude (Anthropic). Name, email, and phone are not sent to AI.
signup.consentMarketing: Send me product updates and offers (optional).
signup.postOtpSubtitle: Add your name to finish setting up
signup.heroSubtitle: Finish setup and start your prep journey

onboarding.hint: You can change this later in Settings.

goalSetup.title: What do you want to become?
goalSetup.subtitle: Choose your dream role — we'll build a personalised ladder to get you there.

profileSetup.title: Tell us about yourself
profileSetup.subtitle: This helps us personalise cutoffs, reservations, and study recommendations.
profileSetup.stepGoalSubtitle: Any exam worldwide — boards, entrance, professional, or competitive
profileSetup.stepAboutSubtitle: Help us personalize your prep journey
profileSetup.stepLanguageSubtitle: You can change this anytime in settings
profileSetup.pickExamError: Pick the exam you are preparing for
profileSetup.customExamRequired: Type your exam name (at least 2 characters)
profileSetup.customExamPlaceholder: e.g. NEET, SAT, IELTS, board exam, State PSC…

otp.heroSubtitle: Sign in with your mobile number — quick and secure
otp.entrySubtitle: We’ll send a secure one-time code.
otp.emailSubtitle: We'll send a one-time code to your email inbox.
otp.consentRequired: Please accept the privacy policy and AI processing consent
otp.otpSentBody: Check your SMS or email inbox.
otp.consentA11y: Agree to privacy policy and terms version {{version}}
otp.verifyHeroSubtitle: Enter the code we sent you
otp.verifyFormSubtitle: Type the 6-digit code from your SMS or email

forgot.heroSubtitle: Reset access to your Sopaan account
forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email on your account. We'll send a one-time code if it matches.
forgot.resetSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code and choose a strong password.

changePassword.title: Password
changePassword.subtitleWithEmail: Update the password for email sign-in. Leave current blank only if you never set one.
changePassword.subtitleOtp: Add a password so you can also sign in with email later. Leave current blank if you never set one.
changePassword.currentPlaceholder: Required if you already have a password
changePassword.successBody: Your password was saved. Other devices were signed out for security.
changePassword.currentRequired: Enter your current password to change it

adminPortal.title: Team console only
adminPortal.body: Team accounts (admin, creator, moderator) manage the platform on the Sopaan admin console — not in the student app.
adminPortal.studentLogin: Sign in as a student instead
adminPortal.webHint: Bookmark the admin console URL for quick access. Students use this app for learning.
